stories.title: Six NBA trade proposals: Landing spots for Morant,...
stories.summary: ESPN's NBA insiders pitch six trades that could rock the offseason. But which move would truly change the league landscape?

stories.title: Roster-building lessons from the NBA's final four ...
stories.summary: What could other teams learn from the Knicks, Cavs, Thunder and Spurs?

stories.title: Spurs shut down OKC in Game 4 to even series
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama set the tone from the beginning of Game 4 on Sunday as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

stories.title: Suarez, 'doing this for Kyle,' wins emotional 600
stories.summary: Daniel Suarez won the rain-shortened Coca-Cola 600 on Sunday night, capping an emotional day in which the auto racing world remembered the late Kyle Busch.

stories.title: Atkinson: Cavs are 'analytically' beating Knicks
stories.summary: Kenny Atkinson said the Cavaliers "analytically" have won two of the first three games against the Knicks in the Eastern Conference finals.
